description_long: This is a commercial upright beverage refrigerator with a glass front door, designed for displaying and cooling drinks. The top front panel features a prominent red Coca-Cola logo, while the left side displays branded graphics and slogans, including images of Coca-Cola and Coca-Cola Zero cans. The right side showcases a large, classic Coca-Cola glass bottle with the text 'since 1886' against a red background. The back of the refrigerator is plain and unadorned, likely made of metal. The interior is visible through the glass door, revealing multiple wire shelves for product storage. The exterior is primarily metal with a combination of glossy and matte finishes, and the base includes a black grille for ventilation.
description: A commercial upright Coca-Cola beverage refrigerator with a glass front door, branded graphics on the sides, and multiple interior wire shelves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass door, interior wire shelves, and a red Coca-Cola logo panel at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view featuring Coca-Cola and Coca-Cola Zero can graphics, a slogan, and a red background.
description_view_2: Rear view, plain and unadorned, likely metallic with no branding or graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a large Coca-Cola glass bottle graphic and red background.
attribute_brand_logo: Coca-Cola logo in white script on a red rectangular panel at the top front, and additional Coca-Cola branding on both side panels.
attribute_door_handle_style: Vertical, protruding handle on the left edge of the glass door, black in color and simple in design.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Horizontal black slats at the bottom front, forming a grille for ventilation.
